description: JSON schema for the updateSystem operation request payload

shortName.description: The system's short name. Skip this if no update should be made.

fullName.description: The system's full name. Skip this if no update should be made.

description.description: The system's description. Skip this if no update should be made or provide as an empty string to remove the current value.

version.description: The system's version information. Skip this if no update should be made or provide as an empty string to remove the current value.
